title: Giselle Hand Made Shabby Chic Vintage Ornate Silver and White 6 x 8 inch photo frame (Silver/White, 8 x 6 inch). Real Wood, Glass glazed.
features: Introducing our Giselle range of hand-made Antique vintage ornate White and Silver shabby chic photo frames. Glazed with real glass and made from real wood, this frame is suitable for a 6 x 8 inch picture or photo.

These distressed Silver and White satin finish wooden frames are hand-made by us in our workshop in East Sussex and use a moulding which is approximately 1 1/4" (30mm) wide and 1" (25mm) deep. The manufacturing process uses a soft sheen white paint overlaying a silver base to give a worn old-fashioned finish. The overall frame size is approximately 8 x 10 inches.

These hand finished frames are glazed with the same 2mm thick framer's quality glass which we use for our bespoke framing work and fitted with a liner. They are fitted with sturdy strut backs for free standing tabletop or wall hanging display in either direction.

These unique frames look great standing on their own or as part of a group. They are particularly suitable for Weddings, Pearl anniversary or Christmas themes. Try mixing sizes and colours for the ultimate feature wall.

This lovely range of white and silver shabby chic frames will brighten up your home. Traditionally made and well packaged they are also available as a rim only (for pictures on canvas), and with a hand-cut mount. Supplied securely bubble wrapped making a great gift.
description: The Giselle Range of Photo and Picture Frames is hand made by us in Sussex using materials sourced from around the world. The frames are made from sustainable timber. The wooden frame moulding is approximately 1 1/4" (30mm) wide and 1" (25mm) deep. They are finished in a satin soft sheen white paint overlaying a silver base and distressed to give a shabby chic effect. The internal edge has a traditional bead effect embossing and the external edge a traditional half loop fleur de lys feature. These frames are available as a rim only (for pictures on canvas), as frames with glass and back and with single mounts. We provide a strut back with frames up to 10 x 12 inch size for free-standing display in either direction. All frames are suitable for wall hanging. Where mounts are included, we use only framer's quality white-core mounts which will not fade for many years. These shabby chic frames look stunning on a wall either on their own or as part of a group. Now available in Sky Blue, Antique Gold, Black, Mint Green, Turquoise Blue, Mustard Yellow, Silver and White finishes.
